---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for BLT
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem It Solves

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address. Why is this change needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution or feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
